args:
set -eu
for path in \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/client.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/client/imp.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/tests/client.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/transport.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/server/src/routes/tests.rs \
  vllm/tests/v1/engine/test_engine_core_client.py
 do
  [ -f "$path" ]
 done
rg -n 'START_DP_WAVE|route|transport|frame|client|engine_core' \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/client.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/client/imp.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/tests/client.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/transport.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/server/src/routes/tests.rs \
  vllm/tests/v1/engine/test_engine_core_client.py >/dev/null
fozzy explore tests/explore.materialization_wave_order.fozzy.json --json >/dev/null
printf 'explore-vllm-rust-transport\n'
